title: Pilosella holmiensis
taxonomy: Pilosella holmiensis is a species within the genus Pilosella and the family Asteraceae. It is also classified as being within the subfamily Cichorioideae. The species Pilosella holmiensis is further divided into the subgenus Eunomus. This classification places Pilosella holmiensis as a member of the tribe Cichorieae. It is a rare plant native to Sweden.
